title: How One Honest Text Breaks a Godly Man's Isolation
caption:
“Good, you?” is the isolation talking.

A godly man was never built to carry it alone. One honest text, one real answer, one brother who asks a second question. That's how years of isolation actually break.

James 5:16: confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed.

#faith #brotherhood #christianman #community #godlyman
